growth_records.medium: Artificial seawater medium (Gulf of Mexico ASM, Henson et al. 2016 [ref 80]) for phage-isolation host cultures; natural seawater-based medium for initial dilution-to-extinction host isolation
growth_records.cite: Buchholz et al. Efficient dilution-to-extinction isolation of novel virus–host model systems for fastidious heterotrophic bacteria. The ISME Journal (2021). DOI:10.1038/s41396-020-00872-z. [PMC8163748]
growth_records.snippet: HTCC1062 and HTCC7211 have specific growth rates of ~0.22 and ~0.12 divisions per day at 10 °C, respectively [46].
growth_records.notes: Value is a secondary citation from ref. 46 quoted within this paper (not measured by these authors). mu (h^-1) = ln2×0.12/24 = 0.00347; doubling_time_h = 24/0.12 = 200 h. [metadata completed from paper Methods: oxygen, medium]
